query: Our AI chatbot sometimes makes up product features that don't exist. Build an eval suite for it.
expected_behavior: Designs adversarial test cases specifically targeting hallucination: prompts that invite the model to invent features
Designs a scoring rubric: how do we measure whether the output is a hallucination vs. a valid answer?
Includes a claim-by-claim verification step: each claim in the output is checked against the source context
Creates synthetic JSONL test data with known-good and known-bad outputs for the rubric
Does not mark the eval suite as complete with only happy-path test cases
